_comment: Manual overrides for the 1836 start converter (tools/convert_history.ps1). Each rule targets a vanilla BASE building key, optionally scoped to a country (region_state tag, e.g. 'GBR') and/or state (e.g. 'STATE_HOME_COUNTIES'). action: 'force_tier' sets the factory to tier N (1-based) regardless of its vanilla PM; 'remove' deletes the factory from the start. Precedence: most specific scope wins (country+state > country > state > none); ties resolved by last rule. Only the 'rules' array is read; '_examples' is ignored. See config/start_baseline.json (generated by tools/extract_start.ps1) for the inventory of what exists to target.
